# Security Reviews\n\nThis directory contains automated admin security review reports generated by the admin-security-reviewer agent.\n\n## Report Naming\n\nReports are named: `YYYY-MM-DD-admin-review.md`\n\n## Review Frequency\n\nSecurity reviews should be run:\n- Before major releases\n- After significant dependency updates\n- After architectural changes to sensitive areas\n- On-demand via workflow_dispatch\n\n## Reading Reports\n\nEach report contains:\n- Executive summary with finding counts\n- Findings categorized by severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low)\n- Remediation recommendations\n- Compliance checklist\n\n## Taking Action\n\n1. Review all critical and high findings\n2. Triage as real issue vs false positive\n3. Create fix issues for validated vulnerabilities\n4. Document accepted risks in issue comments\n
